changed_construction_audit.plain_language_claim: The parser may record the visible structural sequence action predicate plus perfective 咗 plus an overt licensed noun phrase. That structural node does not by itself decide full completion, current relevance, or predicate-object naturalness; semantic incompatibility is handled separately.

sources.citation: Fan and Chan 2022, Language and Linguistics 23(3):371-410
Sio and Bond 2025, Inner and outer aspect in Cantonese

unresolved_questions: A second clean independent speaker has not yet judged the same positive and negative contrasts.
The lexical range of predicate-object combinations remains narrower than the runtime action-verb inventory.
The split final-未 brand question is excluded from the narrow supported core.

changed_construction_audit.plain_language_claim: Several NP plus 用嚟 plus VP strings are acceptable, but current evidence does not establish which accepted strings instantiate the parser's narrow direct-resource relation. Resource scope, overt-user readings, ellipsis, coordination, modal and copular forms, and actual-use readings remain unresolved.

unresolved_questions: The controlled Speaker A form has not been completed.

changed_construction_audit.plain_language_claim: The unused label provided no distinct runtime behavior and duplicated the active TopicComment label, so it was removed from the current grammar while its complete historical note was preserved in the retirement archive.

sources.citation: Canto Span dormant-label audit and runtime search

implementation_validation: PASS required before handoff: 545 regression cases, 43 NP cases, 1,156 standardized construction assertions, registry and note alignment, both panel audits, promotion-gate tests and enforcement, release-gate tests, and repository verification.
linguistic_confidence: supported_productive remains 0. PFV is narrowly provisional with four checked sources, one clean same-contrast speaker, and ten additional grandfathered panel responses that add zero promotion eligibility. RUL is research_pending with five checked sources, a 23-response limited pilot, and zero promotion-eligible speakers. Corpus evidence is not used for either active construction.
overclaim_review_scope: Reviewed the PFV structural template, semantic selection guard, compositional wrapping, learner gloss, RUL relation builder, all changed construction notes, and current release prose. The release does not describe a cleaner or broader analysis than the code implements.
unresolved_release_questions: No construction is supported_productive under the current Definition of Done.
PFV still needs a second clean same-contrast speaker before productive promotion can be considered.
RUL needs a revised interpretation-sensitive instrument and exact code-document reconciliation before provisional status can be reconsidered.
